items.title_en: Dow falls 400 points as oil jumps on fear Iran conflict set to flare up again: Live updates
items.title_zh: 道指下跌 400 点，因担心伊朗冲突将再次爆发，油价上涨：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite are coming off of a solid week, having notched fresh records on Friday.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数和纳斯达克综合指数经历了坚实的一周，周五创下了新纪录。

items.title_en: Supreme Court temporarily lifts mail ban on abortion pill mifepristone
items.title_zh: 最高法院暂时解除对堕胎药米非司酮的邮寄禁令
items.desc_en: Two drugmakers, Danco Laboratories and GenBioPro, over the weekend asked the Supreme Court to restore the ability to order Mifepristone through the mail.
items.desc_zh: Danco Laboratories 和 GenBioPro 两家制药商周末请求最高法院恢复通过邮件订购米非司酮的能力。

items.title_en: UAE says it intercepted Iranian missiles for first time since ceasefire began
items.title_zh: 阿联酋表示自停火开始以来首次拦截伊朗导弹

items.title_en: Circle jumps 16% on Clarity Act compromise that preserves stablecoin rewards
items.title_zh: Circle 因《清晰度法案》妥协而上涨 16%，保留了稳定币奖励
items.desc_en: Lawmakers over the weekend reached a compromise on the market structure bill known as the CLARITY Act that keeps stablecoin reward programs intact.
items.desc_zh: 立法者周末就市场结构法案（称为“清晰法案”）达成了妥协，该法案保持了稳定币奖励计划的完整性。

items.title_en: Bret Taylor's Sierra raises nearly $1 billion months after last capital push

items.title_en: Trump said $465,000 in retirement savings is 'rich.' Is it?

items.desc_zh: 众议院和参议院军事委员会主席表示，撤回 5000 名军人可能会削弱威慑力。

items.title_en: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争以令人惊讶的方式增强了乌克兰的实力。与俄罗斯的停火能否更接近？
items.desc_en: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.
items.desc_zh: 泽连斯基总统一直在访问海湾地区，以展示该国的军事智慧。

items.title_en: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
items.title_zh: 秘密网络将星链技术走私到伊朗以应对互联网中断
items.desc_en: Sahand tells the BBC World Service he sends satellite internet terminals into Iran to help show "the real picture".
items.desc_zh: 萨汉德告诉英国广播公司国际台，他向伊朗发送卫星互联网终端，以帮助展示“真实情况”。

items.title_en: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as family say health deteriorating
items.title_zh: 被监禁的伊朗诺贝尔奖获得者家人表示健康状况恶化，令人担忧
items.desc_en: On Friday her family said the 54-year-old had been taken from prison to a local hospital after a sharp deterioration in her health.
items.desc_zh: 周五，她的家人表示，54 岁的她的健康状况急剧恶化，已被从监狱送往当地一家医院。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。
